description: You are working on a text editor application in IntelliJ IDEA located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/undo-redo-app. Implement the Command design pattern to add undo/redo support by creating a 'com.editor.command' package containing a Command interface (execute, undo), InsertCommand, DeleteCommand, ReplaceCommand, and a CommandHistory class managing undo/redo stacks. The command classes should wrap the corresponding TextEditor methods (insert, delete, replace) and provide logic to reverse those actions. Complete Main.java to demonstrate the pattern by executing three distinct operations (Insert, Insert, Replace), undoing the last two, and redoing one. Record the text state after the initial operations, after each undo, and after the redo to output.txt in the project root. Ensure the project compiles and runs successfully.
